milestoneTitle: Phase M9.1 — Token system foundation: introduced --base + --accent-* derivations via color-mix, per-section overrides on [data-section] and per-panel overrides inside Dashboard, and self-scoped --base on .chip-learn/.chip-projects/.chip-tools so the floating nav carries its own identity. Migrated ~46 identity references (section-head bars, dash-panel-icons, dash-panel :has() indirection + its continue-row consumers, dash-action CTAs, nav chip active/hover) from --color-{learn,projects,tools}-* to --accent-*. Created css/overrides.css (empty, linked after style.css). Added status:"authored" to every lesson in lessons.json. YouTube tile (body chrome) and lesson-modal-xbtn (body-level modal) intentionally left on legacy tokens; they migrate when their parent scopes land in later milestones. Zero visible delta — border/glow/surface recipes use color-mix(in srgb, transparent N%) for byte-for-byte parity with the legacy rgba values.
